rationale: compare_adapter.go has no RunOptions/CompareOptions/QuorumOptions field/literal usages (only comment references remain). RunFunc, runCompareArmWith, RunCompareWith/RunQuorumWith/RunBenchmarkWith, and BenchmarkArmsToCompare flipped to Runtime types. Tests in models_test/prompt_ingress_oversize_test updated; claude_stream_test untouched but its RunOptions literals reference helpers in out-of-scope claude_stream.go.

findings.summary: Bead description listed claude_stream_test.go as in-scope to update, but the commit didn't modify it. AC items don't require it; remaining RunOptions literals there target the still-existing type used by claude_stream.go (step h scope).
Commit message notes pre-existing TestIntegration_CodexEcho failure on base rev — unrelated to this bead.
